content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月25日 周四
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [benchflow-ai/awesome-evals](https://github.com/benchflow-ai/awesome-evals)
   A curated, non-BS library of the best resources for building and evaluating AI a | ⭐169
2. [i5ting/learn-ai-practice](https://github.com/i5ting/learn-ai-practice)
    | ⭐166
3. [iart-ai/motion-skills](https://github.com/iart-ai/motion-skills)
   50 open-source skills that teach your AI coding agent to make motion graphics, a | ⭐165
4. [Johell1NS/browser-search](https://github.com/Johell1NS/browser-search)
   A skill for AI agents: search the web with SearXNG, browse with Camofox, bypass  | ⭐160
5. [trotsky1997/OpenFugu](https://github.com/trotsky1997/OpenFugu)
   Open reimplementation of Sakana Fugu — the 'one model to command them all' LLM o | ⭐137
6. [Reyzowter/Hello-Agents](https://github.com/Reyzowter/Hello-Agents)
   🤖 Building AI Agent Systems from Scratch — A comprehensive, practical tutorial f | ⭐127
7. [lightbearco/tupper](https://github.com/lightbearco/tupper)
   Open-source sandboxes for AI agents — run untrusted, AI-generated code safely on | ⭐122
8. [Simpl3x3/ESEILANE](https://github.com/Simpl3x3/ESEILANE)
   High-performance Knowledge Graph engine for AI, LLMs, and GraphRAG — built for t | ⭐105

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
